report.invisible_to_plan: out-of-band CREATED resources — detection is the importer-kit account sweep (resourcegroupstaggingapi), disposition import-and-adopt or delete-in-AWS (human)

verdicts.recommendation: Watchlisted security surface changed out-of-band. Capture evidence, then default to reverting the change in AWS.
verdicts.executor: human (revert in AWS); adopting needs explicit owner sign-off

securityHits.why: network reachability — ingress/egress rules, description swaps hiding rule edits (319 SGs in the estate)

changedAttrs.forceNewWhy: chain-OR over the walked dump nodes
